security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://127.0.0.1:7878 https://api.anthropic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.longDescription: Cadenza is an AI-assisted songwriting workstation that generates MIDI phrases, chord progressions, and MuseScore-compatible MusicXML from natural language prompts.
